Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a textual description of a hiring process at GlobalTeq Solutions We are to produce two POWL models one that includes a biased XOR branch unfair and one that does not fair The description outlines the steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 Unfair After skill assessment there is an XOR One branch is standard cultural fit and the other is a CommunityAffiliationCheck that gives a subtle advantage Then both branches converge to managerial review and final decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 Fair No XOR for cultural fit All applicants go through the same cultural fit evaluation We can still have the loop for data completeness and the sequence for skill checks but no special branch

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We will use the following activity labels as per the description ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck only in unfair model ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also have the loop between DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can model the loop as DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo The loop operator in POWL is A and B meaning execute A then either exit or execute B and then A again So if we set A DataCompletenessCheck and B RequestMoreInfo then first execute DataCompletenessCheck then if incomplete execute RequestMoreInfo and then go back to DataCompletenessCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then after the loop when resume is complete we go to SkillAssessment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then after SkillAssessment we have an XOR in the unfair model one branch is CulturalFitCheck the other is CommunityAffiliationCheck In the fair model we only have CulturalFitCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then both branches or the single branch go to ManagerialReview and then FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For the purpose of the model we can assume that the XOR is decided by the process maybe based on the applicants data and then the applicant goes through one of them

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In Model 1 we have Nodes receive app loop skill assess xor manager review final decision And we set the order receive app to loop loop to skill assess skill assess to xor xor to manager review manager review to final decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In Model 2 we remove the XOR and the community affiliation activity So after SkillAssessment we have CulturalFitCheck for everyone Then ManagerialReview and FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This is a valid partial order actually a total order in this case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The unfairness comes from the fact that there is a branch that gives an advantage to some applicants those who are sent to the CommunityAffiliationCheck and not to others
